channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drain close to 39 Brondesbury villas, 10th March
item.description:
Blocked drain

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 10th March
item.description:
Persistent litter at the end of the street. Today it’s food waste everywhere and smells awful

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No lighting - risk for lone women at night, 10th March
item.description:
No lights are working in the arches underneath to buidling located between Burrage Grove and Jessup Close. This on-going problem is a safety risk for women walking alone at night and should be a priority for urgent repair.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jessup Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement parking, 10th March
item.description:
This vehicle has been parked on council land obstructing a public walkway for over a month.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bracondale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated sign - out, 10th March
item.description:
B3308 Needs to be re coded
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, High Street, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated sign - out, 10th March
item.description:
B3309
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, High Street, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on Melon Road, 10th March
item.description:
Rubbish keeps being dumped here on Melon Road. I’ve reported it a few times now. It gets cleaned up, but every week there’s new rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Melon Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on melon road, 10th March
item.description:
Rubbish keeps being dumped here on Melon Road. I’ve reported it a few times now. It gets cleaned up, but every week there’s new rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Square, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole appear on side of the road not blocked by roadworks, 10th March
item.description:
After the roadworks were completed on the side of the road going towards Old Street, a pothole appeared (looks like a flat section of the road was just removed) and has been there for over 2 weeks now. Furthermore, the patchwork effort to fill in the road after the road works has left "gaps" on the edges on the replacement tarmac - inevitably, this will be knocked-out by traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Finsbury Square, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road damage by traffic lights (when heading toward New Cross), 10th March
item.description:
The section of the road at the front of the traffic lights as you head towards New Cross is falling apart. It is unsafe to cycle on this part of the road and the condition is deteriorating.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 727, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped garden and building materials, 10th March
item.description:
Fly tipped plastic leaf garden panels, several building waste bags and a pile of construction materials

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Palace Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish outside 1 prince george, 10th March
item.description:
Hi — I had an email to say this had been resolved, but the rubbish is still there. Please can this be sorted. thank you.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince George Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvist Road 77 & 113, 10th March
item.description:
113 - box full of rubbish left from months outside. 77 - pet matress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Furniture dumped, 10th March
item.description:
Furniture and electrical goods dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Caleb Street, The Borough, Greater London

item.title: Same car parked on pavement Pynfolds Estate, 10th March
item.description:
Same car reported multiple times for parking on pavements over night at Pynfolds Estate. Taken at 7am. Car will be gone as usual by time enforcement comes around.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of large bags of soil and garden waste, 10th March
item.description:
Three large white bags filled with soil abd garden waste flytipped on Silverdale Road at the base of a tree opposite house number 30.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Silverdale Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: April Street E8 wood on pavement, 10th March
item.description:
Lots of wood on April Street E8 pavement. Can this be cleared? Many thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): April Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge fly tip and broken bollard, 10th March
item.description:
Huge fly tip at this location and street bollard has been knocked over from the pavement (not sure if this is related to the fly tip)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Kildas Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped still here, 10th March
item.description:

item.title: Rubish here again found this, 10th March
